title: FX Brief — 29 Jun 2026
intro:
Broad USD weakness dominates as EUR and GBP rally on risk-on sentiment, while commodity currencies struggle amid persistent risk-off pressures in AUD and NZD.
💪 CURRENCY RANKING
EUR +0.36% — Leading majors on ECB hawkish repricing and solid eurozone data flows
GBP +0.18% — Sterling supported by BoE rate differential expectations and improved UK sentiment
CHF +0.20% — Safe-haven franc gains as USD weakens despite lower risk appetite
NZD +0.12% — Modest bounce but remains under pressure from week-long commodity sell-off
CAD +0.07% — Loonie stabilizing near 1.4191 despite oil market headwinds
JPY -0.05% — Yen underperforming despite safe-haven appeal as USD/JPY holds above 161.80
AUD -0.02% — Aussie weakest amid China growth concerns and multi-session commodity rout
USD -0.12% — Dollar index bleeding across board on profit-taking and positioning adjustments

sections.heading: 📊 FX THEME
sections.content:
Broad USD weakness dominates as EUR and GBP rally on risk-on sentiment, while commodity currencies struggle amid persistent risk-off pressures in AUD and NZD.
💪 CURRENCY RANKING
EUR +0.36% — Leading majors on ECB hawkish repricing and solid eurozone data flows
GBP +0.18% — Sterling supported by BoE rate differential expectations and improved UK sentiment
CHF +0.20% — Safe-haven franc gains as USD weakens despite lower risk appetite
NZD +0.12% — Modest bounce but remains under pressure from week-long commodity sell-off
CAD +0.07% — Loonie stabilizing near 1.4191 despite oil market headwinds
JPY -0.05% — Yen underperforming despite safe-haven appeal as USD/JPY holds above 161.80
AUD -0.02% — Aussie weakest amid China growth concerns and multi-session commodity rout
USD -0.12% — Dollar index bleeding across board on profit-taking and positioning adjustments

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: EUR/USD | 1.1400 | 1.1365 | 1.1465 | USD weakness continuation, euro momentum intact
LONG: EUR/AUD | 1.6525 | 1.6475 | 1.6625 | Exploit divergence between European strength and Australian commodity weakness
SHORT: AUD/USD | 0.6900 | 0.6935 | 0.6835 | China slowdown fears, commodity correction extending
SHORT: USD/JPY | 161.90 | 162.50 | 160.80 | Intervention risk rising, topside exhaustion near 162.00

sections.heading: ⚠️ RISKS
sections.content: BoJ intervention threat escalates above 162.00 in USD/JPY creating volatility spillover. Sudden China stimulus announcement could reverse AUD/NZD weakness rapidly.
